subcodes.first_line: O my handmaiden! By the life of the true Friend, which is better and sweeter and more excellent than this world and the world to come [3.5s]... ...The land of Ta hath been the seat of the Throne and the dawning place of the Desired Morn. It is the place of the Ukht and where the friends of God repose
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امتی بجان دوست حقیقی که از دنیا و آخرت بهتر و خوشتر و نیکوتر است که
subcodes.subjects: @love of God, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @law of pilgrimage, @Shrines and Holy places, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
